description: Letter sent from Acre shortly after it was taken by the Crusaders in 1104, in which a merchant describes to his parents the terrors of the war, as well as the usefulness of his servant in such a situation. (Information from Mediterranean Society, I, p. 132)
tags: cheese, crusade, Acre, Sicilian cheese, shohet
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מעכו. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
